channel.title: Windows on GrozRab
channel.description: Recent content in Windows on GrozRab

item.title: Switching from Windows to Mac: Why Remapping the Fn Key to Command Saves Your Muscle Memory
item.description:
When switching from Windows to macOS, the single biggest challenge for most people is adapting to the keyboard shortcuts.

On a Windows keyboard, the primary modifier key is Control (Ctrl), located at the absolute far left of the bottom row. On a Mac, the primary modifier key is Command (Cmd), but it is placed right next to the spacebar. To make matters worse, the far-left key on a MacBook layout is actually the Fn (Function) key.

item.title: My Ultimate PC Apps Blueprint: The Essential Software Toolkit I Always Use
item.description:
Every power user needs a foundational software toolkit that transforms raw hardware into a hyper-efficient machine. Over years of building apps, managing digital marketplaces, and editing media, I have dialed in the exact apps that make it onto my storage drives every single time.

This curated, deduplicated list breaks down my essential desktop applications into functional categories. Bookmark this page—I will keep this master layout updated as versions change and new tools earn their place.
